title: सरस्वती मङ्गलाष्टकम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री सरस्वती मङ्गलाष्टकम् ॥

श्रीवाणि विद्यासरसीरुहासनपरे विद्याप्रदे मङ्गलम्।
श्रीशारदे ज्ञानगम्ये सुमेधे श्रितजनप्रिये मङ्गलम्॥१॥

वीणापुस्तककराम्बुजे विमलवाग्वाहिनि शुभ्रे शुभे।
हंसारूढसुशोभिते गुणमये देवि सदा मङ्गलम्॥२॥

कुन्देन्दुतुषारहारधवले मुक्ताविभूषाञ्चिते।
श्वेतपद्मनिवासिनि त्रिजगतामाधारभूते शुभम्॥३॥

ब्रह्माच्युतशम्भुवन्दितपदे लोकत्रयालङ्कृते।
वेदार्थज्ञानदायिनि प्रवरदे ते मङ्गलं मङ्गलम्॥४॥

विद्यावाग्बुद्धिमेधाप्रवरदे सत्यधर्मप्रिये।
सर्वज्ञानप्रकाशिनि निगमगे देवि सदा मङ्गलम्॥५॥

चत्वारो वेदगर्भे कविवरजननि ज्ञानसन्दोहरूपे।
त्वं ब्रह्मस्वरूपिणी जगदधिष्ठानं तवैव स्वरूपम्।
देवि मङ्गलम्॥६॥

यामिन्याः प्रभाकरे निशि दिवा वाचं ददासि प्रभो।
नित्यं ज्ञानविवेकबुद्धिविलसत्तेजस्स्वरूपे नमः।
देवि मङ्गलम्॥७॥

सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्ये वाग्देवि श्रीसरस्वति।
त्वमेव शरणं मह्यं तव मङ्गलमस्तु ते॥८॥

॥ इति श्री सरस्वती मङ्गलाष्टकम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Saraswati Mangalashtakam ||

Shri Vani Vidya-sarasiruhsana-pare Vidya-prade Mangalam.
Shri Sharade Jnana-gamye Sumedhe Shrita-jana-priye Mangalam.||1||

Vina-pustaka-karambuje Vimala-vag-vahini Shubhre Shubhe.
Hamsarudha-sushobhite Gunamayi Devi sada Mangalam.||2||

Kundendu-tushara-hara-dhavale Mukta-vibhushanchite.
Shveta-padma-nivasini Trijagatam-adhara-bhute Shubham.||3||

Brahmachyuta-Shambhu-vandita-pade Loka-trayalamkrite.
Vedartha-jnana-dayini Pravara-de Te Mangalam Mangalam.||4||

Vidya-vag-buddhi-medha-pravarade Satya-dharma-priye.
Sarva-jnana-prakashini Nigama-ge Devi sada Mangalam.||5||

Chatvaro Veda-garbhe Kavi-vara-janani Jnana-sandoha-rupe.
Tvam Brahma-swarupini Jagad-adhishthanam tavaiva swarupam.
Devi Mangalam.||6||

Yaminyah prabhakare nishi diva vacham dadasi prabho.
Nityam jnana-viveka-buddhi-vilasat-tejah-swarupe namah.
Devi Mangalam.||7||

Sarva-mangala-mangalye Vag-devi Shri Saraswati.
Tvam-eva sharanam mahyam Tava Mangalam-astu te.||8||

|| Iti Shri Saraswati Mangalashtakam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: श्री वाणी, विद्या के कमलासन पर विराजमान, विद्याप्रदा को मंगल हो। शारदा, ज्ञानगम्या, सुमेधा, शरणागत प्रिया को मंगल हो। वीणा-पुस्तक हाथ में धारण करने वाली, विमल वाक् की वाहिनी, शुभ्र, हंसारूढ़, गुणमयी देवी को सदा मंगल हो। ब्रह्मा-विष्णु-शम्भु द्वारा वन्दित, त्रिलोकाधार, वेदार्थ ज्ञानदायिनी को मंगल। सर्वमंगलमांगल्ये वाग्देवी सरस्वती, आप ही मेरी शरण हैं, आपका मंगल हो।
benefits: Eight verses of auspicious blessings to Saraswati
Brings auspiciousness in all educational pursuits
Grants wisdom, intellect and discriminating knowledge
Ideal for chanting before examinations or study
Invokes the blessings of the Vedic goddess of learning
description: Saraswati Mangalashtakam (सरस्वती मङ्गलाष्टकम्) is an eight-verse devotional hymn dedicated to Goddess Saraswati. This revered text originates from Traditional. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to invoke the blessings of the Vedic goddess of learning as well as bring auspiciousness in all educational pursuits. Additionally, it is known to grant wisdom, intellect and discriminating knowledge. For best results, devotees chant this on Wednesday (Budhvar) and Thursday (Guruvar) and during Vasant Panchami. At 8 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 7 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Saraswati Mangalashtakam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Saraswati Mangalashtakam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Eight auspicious verses to Goddess Saraswati for wisdom and learning.
